emailText:
Hi there,

I came across the The Glasshouse Hotel website and wanted to share some honest observations based on a quick audit. No pitch - just a fresh pair of eyes.

========================================
Website Health Check - Score: 79/100
========================================

5 issues identified:

HIGH
--------------------
- 1 HTTPS mixed content
 MEDIUM
--------------------
- Missing alt tags on 6 images
 MEDIUM
--------------------
- No FAQ schema
 MEDIUM
--------------------
- No blog section
 MEDIUM
--------------------
- Slow hero video


WHAT'S WORKING WELL
--------------------
+ Business is established and operational
+ Has independent web presence
+ Active in local market

========================================

Your current website provider should be flagging things like this for you.

If you ever need a fresh pair of eyes or a new provider, just reach out.

Best,
David
DS Studios

issues.detail: A single HTTP element on an HTTPS page can trigger the mixed content warning.
issues.label: 1 HTTPS mixed content
issues.check: Check DevTools > Console for mixed content warnings.
issues.siteHint: Even one warning undermines visitor trust.

issues.label: Missing alt tags on 6 images
issues.siteHint: This issue may affect user experience or rankings.

issues.detail: FAQ rich results in Google are a missed opportunity for visibility.
issues.label: No FAQ schema
issues.check: Search a common question about your business. Do you see expandable answers?
issues.siteHint: FAQ rich results take up 3x more space in search results.

issues.detail: A blog provides fresh content for Google and showcases your venue to potential guests.
issues.label: No blog section
issues.check: Is there a News, Blog, or Stories section on the site?
issues.siteHint: Hotel sites with blogs get 55% more organic traffic.

issues.label: Slow hero video
issues.siteHint: This issue may affect user experience or rankings.
